summary: Completed testing of Pack 3 (Multi-Service + Promo Taxonomy, Commission Rules Editor, Affiliate Promo Benefit) and Pack 2 cart integrations. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical admin and customer flows verified.

issues: React key warning: Duplicate keys 'facilities_services' and 'printing_branding' - likely duplicate service groups in database
React key warning: Multiple affiliates with null id causing duplicate key warnings

action_items: Consider deduplicating service groups in database (facilities_services, printing_branding appear twice)
Ensure all affiliates have unique non-null IDs to avoid React key warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceTaxonomyAdminSetup.jsx uses group_key as React key which may not be unique if duplicate groups exist
AdminAffiliateManagerSimple.jsx uses affiliate.id as key which may be null for some records
seed_data_creation: Created test service groups and affiliates via API during testing (TEST* prefixed codes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 3 features fully tested. Service Taxonomy has 18 groups (some with subgroups, some legacy without). Affiliate Manager has 3 tabs (Affiliates, Commission Rules, Promo Benefit). Commission rules default: 5% affiliate, 3% sales, 50000 TZS threshold. MultiPromoCustomizationBuilder and MultiServiceRequestBuilder accessible from customer marketplace via toggle buttons. Cart drawer has LockedSavedDetailsSection with Change toggle and ConfirmActionModal for payment submission.

backend: GET /api/multi-request/service-taxonomy - Returns 18 service groups with subgroups ✓
GET /api/referral-commission/rules - Returns commission rules (5% affiliate, 3% sales) ✓
POST /api/referral-commission/affiliate/create - Creates affiliate with promo code ✓
GET /api/referral-commission/admin/affiliates - Returns affiliate list with stats ✓
frontend: Admin login at /admin/login works ✓
Admin sidebar has 'Service Taxonomy' link under SETTINGS section ✓
Service Taxonomy link navigates to /admin/service-taxonomy ✓

Add Group form has group_key, group_name, subgroups inputs ✓
Admin sidebar has 'Affiliates' link under OPERATIONS section ✓
Affiliates link navigates to /admin/affiliate-manager ✓
Affiliate Manager has 3 tabs: Affiliates, Commission Rules, Promo Benefit ✓
Affiliates tab shows table with Name, Code, Status, Clicks, Leads, Sales, Unpaid Commission ✓
Commission Rules tab shows editable fields (affiliate %, sales %, threshold, allow-both) ✓
Promo Benefit tab shows affiliate selector grid ✓
Customer login at /login works ✓
Customer marketplace /account/marketplace loads with 3 tabs ✓
Promo tab has 'Build Multi-Item Quote' toggle button ✓
Clicking toggle shows MultiPromoCustomizationBuilder ✓
MultiPromoCustomizationBuilder has item selection, color, size, quantity, brief ✓
Services tab has 'Build Multi-Service Request' button ✓
Clicking button shows MultiServiceRequestBuilder ✓
MultiServiceRequestBuilder has group/subgroup dropdowns populated from taxonomy ✓
Cart drawer opens with product items ✓
Cart shows quantity controls, subtotal, VAT (18%), total ✓
Cart has 'Proceed to Checkout' button ✓

cart_flow_verified.cart_items: Shows product name, price, quantity controls ✓
